evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not include any checks or validations related to the affiliate ledger or statement exports. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the specified requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
